reasoning: Globant just received a fresh Wedbush initiation with Outperform and $61 PT, yet the stock dropped 4.5% today — creating a compelling entry point. The company is uninitiated in our coverage, trades at historically depressed multiples despite being a premier AI/digital transformation player, and multiple recent headlines cite it as 'too cheap to ignore.' This disconnect between Wall Street bullishness and price action is our analytical edge.
title: Globant: The AI Services Play Hiding in Plain Sight at 12x Forward Earnings
angle: Consensus sees GLOB as a generic IT services company facing macro headwinds, but Liria sees an AI-native digital transformation partner with 70%+ exposure to US/EU enterprises precisely when GenAI implementation budgets are accelerating. The Wedbush initiation validates the thesis, but the market is pricing in Argentina risk and consulting slowdown fears that misunderstand Globant's differentiated positioning.
